description: A vertical graphic. The top half is a photograph of identity documents on a white surface, including a passport, a chip-bearing identification card, scattered passport-style headshot photos of a bearded man, and a pair of scissors, with a page showing an Australia machine-readable zone visible. The bottom half is a dark navy panel with the U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal and the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services wordmark, beneath which yellow and white text reads Providing a fake document to USCIS is fraud, and Fraud can get you permanently banned from the U.S.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; Providing a fake document to USCIS is fraud; Fraud can get you permanently banned from the U.S.
